image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science reveals a secret about learning math that most of us overlook.
Context visual: Interleaving isn't just mixing things up; it’s a powerful way to improve retention and understanding.
Escalation visual: Imagine practicing different math concepts in one session instead of focusing on one. Sounds wild, right?
Evidence visual: Studies show this approach helps the brain form connections, making recall easier. But why does it work?
Payoff visual: It’s about breaking the monotony. Your brain thrives on challenge and change. That’s the magic of interleaving!
Cta visual: Curious to learn more? Hit subscribe for more mind-bending insights into learning!
